assessment_objectives.objective: the frequency at which to assess and review the supply chain-related risks associated with suppliers or contractors and the systems, system components or system services they provide is defined.

the supply chain-related risks associated with suppliers or contractors and the systems, system components or system services they provide are assessed and reviewed per an organization-defined frequency.
supply chain elements, processes and actors to be analyzed and tested are defined.
organization-defined mechanisms are employed on supply chain elements, processes and actors associated with the system, system component or system service.
processes, methods, and techniques to monitor security requirement compliance by external service providers on an ongoing basis are implemented.
